frame_analyses.description: Wide shot of FLS training lab with multiple trainer boxes visible on table with overhead lighting and monitor displays
Monitor display showing laparoscopic view of peg transfer board with red foam objects on left side pegs and green objects on right side
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard peg transfer board layout visible on monitor; demonstrates task setup

frame_analyses.description: Instructor in business attire gesturing near the trainer box, appearing to explain the task
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instructional content — instructor is teaching/explaining rather than performing timed task

frame_analyses.description: Close-up laparoscopic view showing grasper instruments approaching peg transfer board; red foam object visible on left peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstration of proper instrument approach and grasp technique

frame_analyses.description: Two grasper instruments manipulating a red foam object, lifting it from left peg
Grasper transferring red foam object in midair between peg columns
Red foam object being placed on right-side peg with controlled descent
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates proper placement technique with controlled instrument movement

score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable — instructional video, not a timed performance

confidence_rationale: This is an instructional/educational video showing FLS setup, explanation by an instructor, and demonstration of proper peg transfer technique. It is NOT a timed trainee performance. The content includes wide shots of the training lab, an instructor explanation segment, and close-up laparoscopic demonstrations of correct handling technique. No timing data, no penalties applicable.
cannot_determine: Completion time — video is instructional demonstration, not a timed performance attempt
Penalties — video does not show a trainee performing under time constraints
Actual task performance — only technique demonstration shown
technique_summary: Instructional video demonstrating proper peg transfer technique including correct two-handed instrument coordination, smooth midair transfer, and controlled placement. Intended as educational content for trainee instruction.

demonstrated_techniques: Two-hand coordination for foam object manipulation
Proper grasper positioning for pickup at peg base
Controlled descent and placement on destination peg
Correct laparoscopic instrument handling posture and approach angle
verbal_cues: Instructor explanation of task setup visible in frames 8-11 (narration not audible but context indicates teaching)
common_errors_addressed: Avoiding jerky instrument movements during transfer
Precision placement to avoid dropping on adjacent pegs

assessment_note: This video should NOT be scored as a timed performance. It is educational content demonstrating correct FLS peg transfer technique. If you have a separate performance video of a trainee attempting this task under time constraints, please provide that for formal scoring.
